config.script:
"""
	Written By: Sagar Iparkar
	Written Date: 10/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Start/Complete orders from screen
	"""
	try:
		action = self.view.params.value
		rowData = self.view.params.rowData
		areaId  = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		lineId = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workstationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		AreaName = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		LineName = self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WorkStationName = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		shiftdetails = str(Project_VECV.WashingMachine.Shift.getShiftName(lineId))
		shiftdetails = shiftdetails.split('-')
		if len(shiftdetails) == 0:
			state = "success"
			message = 'Shift Not Configured'
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
		else:
			shiftId = shiftdetails[1]
			shiftCode = shiftdetails[0]
			userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			bomId = rowData['m_BOM_id']
			M_BOMNumber = rowData['M_BOMNumber']
			orderNumber = rowData['order_number']
			serialNumber= rowData['serial_number']
			gearRation= rowData['GearRation']
			orderStatusId = 0
			if int(action) == 1:
				eventId = 3
				message = 'Order Started'
				orderStatusId = 1
				try:
					userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
					ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
					data="orderNumber Started %s "%str(orderNumber)
					Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
				except:
					pass
			else:
				eventId = 5
				message = 'Order Completed'
				try:
					stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
					state='Info'
					userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
					ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
					data="Serial Generated %s for ordernumber %s "%(str(serialNumber),str(orderNumber))
					Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
				except:
					pass
				res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId})
				pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
				for row in pyres:
					IP = row["IPAddress"]
					port = row["Port"]
				shiftId = shiftdetails[1]
				shiftCode = shiftdetails[0]
				try:
					LineName=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
					if LineName.upper()=='HUB SUB ASSY LINE'.upper():
						NoofPrint=4
						Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,gearRation,shiftCode,IP,port,NoofPrint)
						try:
							stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
							state='Info'
							userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
							ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
							data="print for %s completed"%(str(serialNumber))
							Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
						except:
							pass
					elif LineName.upper()=='LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE'.upper():
						NoofPrint=1                       
						Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,gearRation,shiftCode,IP,port,NoofPrint)
						try:
							stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
							state='Info'
							userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
							ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
							data="print for %s completed"%(str(serialNumber))
							Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
						except:
							pass                   
					else:                        
						NoofPrint=1                        
						Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,gearRation,shiftCode,IP,port,NoofPrint)   
						try:
							stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
							state='Info'
							userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
							ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
							data="print for %s completed"%(str(serialNumber))
							Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
						except:
							pass   
				except:
					message = 'Printer Failed.'
					state = "warning"
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
					try:
						stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
						state='Error'
						userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
						ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
						data="print Failed for %s"%(str(serialNumber))
						Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
					except:
						pass
				project=system.util.getProjectName()
				messageHandler = "OrderRefresh"
				system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")										
		
			params = {'Area_Id':areaId,'Line_Id':lineId,'WorkStation_Id':workstationId,'Event_Id':eventId,'BOM_Id':bomId,'Status_Id':orderStatusId,'OperatorID':userId,'CreatedBy':userId,'OrderNumber':orderNumber,'M_BOMNumber':M_BOMNumber,'serialNumber':serialNumber}	
			result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/NumberPunching/addUpdateNumberPunching",params)
			if str(result) == '1':
				result=str(result)
				state = "success"
	
			else:
				message = 'failed'
				state = "warning"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
			system.perspective.sendMessage("OrderWashingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
			
			#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine/SAStartCompleteButton')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
